apps.name: ARMSX2 iOS
apps.subtitle: PlayStation 2 emulation, built for iOS.
apps.localizedDescription:
ARMSX2 brings PlayStation 2 emulation to iOS with an ARM64-focused build, controller-friendly play, and local-network support for compatible titles.

A JIT-capable setup is required. Performance and compatibility vary by device, iOS version, game, and sideloading environment. You must provide your own BIOS and game backups.

versions.localizedDescription:
Updated to ARMSX2 iOS 1.2.2.

Updated ARMSX2 iOS version display to 1.2.2.
Added battery percentage to the performance overlay.
Added device heat status to the performance overlay.
Added app RAM usage to the performance overlay.
Added Low Power Mode indicator when enabled.
Added color warnings for heat and low battery states.
Added new OSD/Overlay settings page.
Added OSD preset controls for Off, Simple, Detail, and Full.
Added OSD position setting.
Improved performance overlay readability.

permissions.usageDescription: ARMSX2 uses local network access for PS2 online play through DEV9 sockets.
